review_title: Teamwork allows us to manage all your projects without problems
description: Collaboration between clients and service providers located in different parts of the world. The features of the collaborative software are ideal for kickstarting our projects. It's simple to assign responsibilities and monitor development.
author: Grace B.
pros: Extremely nice interface and straightforward structure. Extremely open to suggestions and alterations. Manage the flow of work on projects and programs. The video production process at our company is intricate, including many different people and jobs, all of which are dependent on one another.
cons: The only things that matter are tasks and projects. However, reorienting the platform to serve as a workspace app may prove fruitful. Even while feature-rich customer relationship management (CRM) systems are available, they cannot function without additional software.

description: Overall we still really like this software as we tried monday.com for iur team and it was a really bad fit for ourselves and our clients so we went back to teamwork.
author: Irene P.
pros: I like that you can have long task descriptions (unlike monday.com) and the commenting layout is very easy to read and follow (unlike monday).
cons: I'm not crazy about the bew modern look and layout, it's difficult to view a task in full screen mode which is really needed because in our compqny we write very long task descriptions. And also the My Tasks view used to be better wherr I could see my tasks chronologically without the separators of "past due" "this week" etc. I used to just only see tasks within the next fee days instead of having to see all tasks assigned to me and after their updates that changed.

description: On an overall point of view, my experience with teamwork is positive. If my tasks are organized then most my work is organized and teamwork makes it easy to keep it organized and get the data I want when needed.
author: Tejaswini T.
pros: the features are easy to understand and use, and workflow automation helped me in reducing manual effort in many ways! Also retrieving the data based on filters has been very useful to me.
cons: One thing I liked the least is the need to add tags manually to tasks every time. And that is something which I forget, most of the bugs have the title as 'Bug' in my case, I wish it adds tags based on that.

description: We have used Teamwork for some projects but found it inferior to other project management tools. Important updates got lost because of the structure of the tasks, and the team didn't find the tool intuitive.
author: Amanda H.
pros: Teamwork is collaborative so the whole team can use it.
cons: Compared to other project management tools Teamwork is inferior. It's hard to organize tasks by category and sub category, and tracking changes or updates on a task is much harder than in other tools, making Teamwork messy for project management.

author: Nayla A.
pros: I genuinely enjoy using Teamwork. Even as a solo freelance film director, it gives me a clear and structured way to manage daily tasks, deadlines and my calendar. In an industry that can often feel chaotic and fast moving, it brings focus, organization and calm. A true must have.
cons: Working solo gives me freedom, yet I miss real time feedback and shared creative energy. sometimes!!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Timesheet Tool That Truly Delivers Value
description: A reliable, feature-rich, and user-friendly timesheet solution that truly enhances organizational efficiency. Highly recommended for teams seeking accuracy, automation, and simplicity in their time‑tracking process.
author: Gaurav K.
pros: Value for Money: Its wide range of functionalities—usually found only in higher‑priced platforms—makes it a cost‑effective choice for teams of any size. Ease of Use: The learning curve is minimal. Even first‑time users can navigate the system effortlessly thanks to its clean layout and intuitive flow. Tasks like logging hours, approving timesheets, or modifying entries take just a few clicks. User Interface: The UI is modern, well‑organized, and visually appealing. Clear menus, logical navigation, and a clutter‑free dashboard make everyday operations smooth and frustration‑free. Features: From detailed time tracking to integrated reporting, project‑level breakdowns, and automated notifications, the feature set is robust and thoughtfully designed. Everything feels purposeful and aligned with real-world workflow needs. Workflow Automation: Automation has been a game changer. Approval flows, reminders, and compliance checks run seamlessly in the background, saving managers significant time and reducing manual errors. Organizational Management: The tool makes it incredibly easy to manage teams, projects, and departments. Administrators can assign roles, monitor performance, and maintain oversight with high-level visibility while employees enjoy a streamlined task experience. Customer Support: Support has been outstanding. The team is responsive, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in helping users get the most out of the platform.
cons: Missing on the mobile application, this contradicts Ease of Use and User Interface, which imply consistently smooth usability across platforms.

review_title: Great, easy, convenient and organized tool
description: Teamwork is easy to use. The process automation is convenient and, overall, we find the services helpful to our productivity.
author: Maya V.
pros: organizational management and task tracking are most useful to me personally. As an organization, we also appreciate the good customer support.
cons: The value for money is lower for us as we do not utilize all the tools we should. This is more our responsibility and internal limitations however.

author: Allie P.
pros: The ease of use and how organized it keeps our processes. It's clear and easy to make adjustments and edits.
cons: Honestly, the program doesn't really gave any faults. Sometimes I have to click a few times to open a folder but that could just be user error lol

author: Kyle B.
pros: Easily plan and manage tasks, the interface is simple, workflow automations are great. Customer service is solid, and the features of the app make daily/weekly tasks super easy. Price is very fair.
cons: Nothing, been using it for a few years and no complaints. Overall it works great for me for organize taks, planning completation dates, and storing data related to tasks.

description: My overall experience with Teamwork.com was really positive. It made collaborating with the team smooth and kept projects organized. I appreciated how it streamlined communication and made tracking progress simple.
author: Boghos A.
pros: What I liked most about Teamwork.com was how easy it made working together. Everything felt organized, and it really helped the team stay on the same page. I also liked that it made communication simple without feeling overwhelming
cons: The only downside I noticed was that certain features could be a little clunky or take extra steps to get exactly what I needed. But overall, it was still a very helpful tool.

review_title: Best project management system for digital agencies
description: We've tried many other project management systems, including Monday, Basecamp, Trello, and Wrike. I don't think any of them compare to Teamwork for our needs and how we operate.
author: Chris O.
pros: I run a digital agency. Teamwork is crucial to managing our projects and keeping track of everything in one place. It's flexible enough to handle different project types, from flat fee to hourly billing. My clients often comment on how much they like using Teamwork for communication and collaboration.
cons: I have been using Teamwork for about 10 years. I really like the improvements they have made over time. My only complaint is that we used to be billed based on the number of active projects. However, in recent years, they switched to a per-user license fee.

description: It's very flexible and allows me to accurately record the hours spent on each project,giving me valuable insights into how much time certain task takes.
author: Ruth K.
pros: I like that it allows me to create detailed project plans,set deadlines and assign responsibilities,which helps me stay on the track.
cons: The interface can be more friendly and easy to understand otherwise it is very easy to implement.

review_title: Top-notch and Robust Cloud Encrypted Marketing and PM Software
description: Digital Marketing planning and social media platforms integrations. Online project management and business budgeting. Agile team communication and productivity.
author: Jesse D.
pros: How it realistically ease online projects activity and bug tracking, time and expense management. Ease of use with pre-made/built blocks. Advanced features and modules.
cons: Teamwork.com is unshakable, no complain to make.

author: Kelvin K.
pros: Ever since 2020, it hs been seamless to handle complex projects and task management processes with the help of Teamwork.com.
cons: I mainly use my iOS mobile application which rarely pose any issues.

author: Comfort B.
pros: I have been using Teamwork.com ever since 2016 as GM in my previous organization. I like that it simplify project and task management processes via workflow automation.
cons: Teamwork.com lack offline access which makes it hard to work when not connected to the internet.

author: Joy I.
pros: Teamwork.com offers robust task and project management capabilities which saves time by automating workflow.
cons: Ever since I incorporated Teamwork.com, I have never had any issue.

review_title: I Use Teamwork.com as an Alternative! 🔜 I will Make it My Full Time PPM
author: Chinwe A.
pros: Teamwork.com streamlines the process of task and project management via real-time workflow automation.
cons: I use Teamwork.com as monday.com alternative and I can barely the difference since it suits all my needs.

review_title: What’s Teamwork.com? Know it Before You Try it.
author: Daisy M.
pros: It is easy for me to create tasks, plan and manage projects and track time automatically with Teamwork.com.
cons: It depends on internet for 24/7 due to lack of offline access.

review_title: Teamwork.com: Comprehensive PPM Tool that I Highly Trust
author: Solomon O.
pros: Teamwork.com makes it super easy and rapid to plan, track and manage projects and tasks through real-time workflow automation.
cons: Even my overall rating depicts that I have nothing which I can outline as a flaw.

review_title: Why Teamwork.com is the Best for PPM
author: Bilal V.
pros: Teamwork.com streamlines project and task management processes through workflow automation.
cons: Ever since I started using Teamwork.com in my previous organization in 2016, I have never come across any drawback.

review_title: Works well for task management & collaboration
author: Tyler N.
pros: I enjoy using this for projects & task lists.
cons: I find that it is buggy sometimes, and I found myself not wanting to use some of their features.

description: Enjoyed being able to communicate faster, and communicate altogether in a professional manner.
author: Alifah A.
pros: Being able to communicate with my colleagues quickly
cons: It can get quite confusing with all the different functions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ibrahim U.
pros: Teamwork.com not only allocates PM & TM but also have collaboration and internal communications capabilities.
cons: Never have I experienced any flaw while using Teamwork.com.

author: Leticia S.
pros: Teamwork.com is a robust PPM tool that I use on a daily basis to automate major business processes such as time tracking.
cons: I have not noticed any flaw for a while now while using Teamwork.com.

author: Obi A.
pros: I like the fact that Teamwork.com not only allocates PPM tools but also has collaboration, resource management and time tracking functionalities.
cons: I have nothing that I like least about Teamwork.com.
